system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Heavy Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

Your meteor hammer slams into a foe, knocking him to the ground as it potentially bounces toward someone else. Make a Heavy Melee Skill roll against Parry. On a success you strike a foe with such force, that they drop to the ground and back by 5 feet per Rank of Waijia and they must expend a Move to get back up (in addition to taking normal Damage). On a Total Success the hammer bounces against the nearest target of your choice (this occurs even if it is countered) by the first target). Cathartic: This knocks your foe back 10 feet per Rank of Waijia and they hit the ground so hard they must spend a Skill and Move action to get up.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This knocks your foe back 10 feet per Rank of Waijia and they hit the ground so hard they must spend a Skill and Move action to get up.
